title: Provide Privacy and Security Notices Consistent with Applicable CUI Rules
description: provide privacy and security notices consistent with applicable CUI rules

checks.name: Privacy and Security Notices are Identified and Associated with CUI Category
checks.purpose: Identification of required CUI privacy and security notices is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Privacy and Security Notices are Displayed
checks.purpose: Verify that a logon banner containing privacy and security notice text is configured and displayed to users prior to system access via Group Policy or local registry

checks.name: Privacy and Security Notices are Identified and Associated with CUI Category
checks.purpose: Identification of required CUI privacy and security notices is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Privacy and Security Notices are Displayed
checks.purpose: Verify that a logon banner containing privacy and security notice text is configured and displayed to users prior to system access via Group Policy or local registry

checks.name: Privacy and Security Notices are Identified and Associated with CUI Category
checks.purpose: Identification of required CUI privacy and security notices is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Privacy and Security Notices are Displayed
checks.purpose: Verify that a logon banner is configured in /etc/issue, /etc/issue.net, /etc/motd, and sshd_config Banner directive with non-empty CUI-relevant notice text

checks.name: Privacy and Security Notices are Identified and Associated with CUI Category
checks.purpose: Identification of required CUI privacy and security notices is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

checks.name: Privacy and Security Notices are Displayed
checks.purpose: Verify that a logon banner is configured in /etc/issue, /etc/issue.net, /etc/motd, and sshd_config Banner directive with non-empty CUI-relevant notice text
